title: Approval Rejected
description: 审批驳回时触发（任意步骤驳回即整单驳回）

metadata.description: Event metadata conforming to D2-2 Event Metadata Standard (10-field fixed template).

event_id.description: Globally unique identifier for the event instance.

version.description: Semantic version of the event schema.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the event was produced.

source.description: Origin system or service that produced the event.

producer.description: Specific component or service instance that produced the event.

correlation_id.description: Identifier used to correlate related events across multiple systems.

causation_id.description: Identifier of the event that caused this event (e.g., the parent command).

tenant_id.description: Tenant or organization namespace the event belongs to.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who triggered the event.

payload.description: Approval rejection data payload for a fully rejected request.

request_id.description: Unique identifier of the approval request.

chain_id.description: Identifier of the approval chain definition.

chain_name.description: Display name of the approval chain.

reject_step.description: Identifier of the step where the rejection occurred.

reject_step_name.description: Display name of the step where the rejection occurred.

rejecter_id.description: Identifier of the user who rejected the request.

rejecter_name.description: Display name of the user who rejected the request.

rejected_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the rejection occurred.

business_type.description: Type of business entity that was rejected.

business_id.description: Identifier of the business entity that was rejected.

is_final.description: Whether this is a final rejection (request cannot be resubmitted) or a provisional rejection (request can be re-submitted).
